intro: A clear agreement for clients and visitors. No fine print — just the essentials.

sections.heading: Agreement to these terms
sections.body: By using this website or hiring Good Bones Web Inc. for services, you agree to these Terms of Service. If you do not agree, please do not use the site or submit a project inquiry.

sections.heading: What we do
sections.body: Good Bones Web Inc. provides website design, development, strategy, and site rescue services for businesses. Every project is scoped individually, and the specific deliverables, timeline, and cost are agreed upon in writing before work begins.

sections.heading: Quotes and payment
sections.body:
• Project quotes are valid for 14 days unless otherwise stated.
  • A deposit is usually required to begin work. The amount is specified in your project agreement.
  • Remaining payments are due according to the milestones or schedule outlined in the agreement.
  • Late payments may delay project delivery.

sections.heading: Client responsibilities
sections.body:
To keep a project moving, clients agree to:

  • Provide content, branding assets, and feedback in a timely manner.
  • Review deliverables and share approvals or revisions within the agreed timeframe.
  • Ensure they have the rights to any materials they provide, such as photos, text, and logos.
  • Maintain their own accounts for third-party services unless otherwise arranged.

sections.heading: Revisions and scope changes
sections.body: Each project includes a set number of revision rounds defined in the agreement. Additional revisions or new requests outside the original scope may require extra time and cost. We will always discuss scope changes with you before proceeding.

sections.heading: Intellectual property
sections.body:
After final payment, clients receive the rights to use the final website and design deliverables for their business. Good Bones Web Inc. retains the right to display the work in our portfolio and marketing unless otherwise agreed in writing.

We do not claim ownership of client-provided content, logos, trademarks, or other pre-existing materials.

sections.heading: Website hosting and maintenance
sections.body: Unless included in your project agreement, website hosting, domain registration, and ongoing maintenance are the client's responsibility. We offer optional maintenance plans and are happy to recommend trusted hosting providers.

sections.heading: Limitations of liability
sections.body:
Good Bones Web Inc. is not liable for indirect, incidental, or consequential damages related to the use of our services or website. Our total liability for any project is limited to the amount paid for that project.

We build websites with care, but we cannot guarantee uninterrupted availability, perfect security, or specific business results such as traffic or sales.

sections.heading: Cancellations and refunds
sections.body: If a project is cancelled after work has begun, the deposit is non-refundable. Any completed work beyond the deposit value will be billed proportionally. We will communicate clearly about what has been completed at the time of cancellation.

sections.heading: Changes to these terms
sections.body: We may update these Terms of Service occasionally. The latest version will always be available on this page with the updated date. Continued use of the site or our services means you accept the updated terms.

sections.heading: Governing law
sections.body: These terms are governed by the laws of the Province of Alberta, Canada. Any disputes will be handled in Edmonton, Alberta.

sections.heading: Contact us
sections.body: Questions about these terms? Get in touch.
